title: 5. **AI Agent Content Creation**
summary:
What it is: Sell pre-made, AI-generated content packages (e.g., social media posts, blog articles) on platforms like Gumroad or PromptBase.
Revenue model: One-time sales of digital content products.
Time to first dollar: 1-3 days.
First action: Develop a portfolio of high-quality, AI-generated content examples to showcase on the sales platform.
Risk/blocker: Initial competition from human creators and other AI tools, necessitating unique selling points or high quality.
